p.strong: Dynamic Scoping: Variables resolved at call time, not definition time

div.p: Dynamic Scope: Variable lookup walks up the call stack

ul.li: g() sees f's local x, not global x

div.p: bash x=global f() { local x=f_local echo "f sees: $x" # f_local g echo "f after g: $x" # f_local } g() { echo "g sees: $x" # f_local! local w=g_local } f echo "global after f: $x" # global

ul.li: More flexible, harder to reason about
